text: How should the painter of a life raft, which is fitted with an HRU, be secured to the ship?

options.text: A) Secured via a weak link to a secure point.
B) Secured to a part of the hydrostatic release unit that is designed to break free.
C) It should not be secured in any way.
D) Directly to a secure point on the ship.

explanation: The painter is secured via a weak link so that if the vessel sinks, the raft will float free, and the link will break once the raft is inflated, preventing it from being dragged down.
